ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State abbreviation of the institution's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the institution */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the institution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the institution can enroll */,
  "web_url" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_year_data" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year data entry */,
  "unitid" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the institution for the year */,
  "adm_rate" REAL /* Admission rate for the year */,
  "ugds" INTEGER /* Total undergraduate enrollment */,
  "costt4_a" REAL /* Total cost of attendance */,
  "tuitionfee_in" REAL /* In-state tuition fee */,
  "tuitionfee_out" REAL /* Out-of-state tuition fee */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate within 4 years */,
  "actcm25" INTEGER /* 25th percentile ACT composite score */,
  "actcm75" INTEGER /* 75th percentile ACT composite score */,
  "actcmmid" INTEGER /* Midpoint ACT composite score */,
  "npt" REAL /* Net price for students after financial aid */,
  "retention_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students who continue to the next year */,
  "transfer_students" INTEGER /* Number of transfer students */,
  "faculty_count" INTEGER /* Number of faculty members */,
  "research_funding" REAL /* Total research funding received by the institution */,
  "student_to_faculty_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of students to faculty members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_year_data_unitid FOREIGN KEY ("unitid") REFERENCES institutions ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission entry */,
  "unitid" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "total_applications" INTEGER /* Total number of applications received */,
  "accepted" INTEGER /* Total number of applications accepted */,
  "enrolled" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the admission data */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applications */,
  "early_decision_accepted" INTEGER /* Number of early decision applications accepted */,
  "international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "diversity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the diversity of the student body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_unitid FOREIGN KEY ("unitid") REFERENCES institutions ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tuition fee entry */,
  "unitid" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "in_state_fee" REAL /* Tuition fee for in-state students */,
  "out_state_fee" REAL /* Tuition fee for out-of-state students */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the fee data corresponds to */,
  "room_and_board" REAL /* Cost of room and board */,
  "books_and_supplies" REAL /* Average cost of books and supplies */,
  "other_expenses" REAL /* Average cost of other expenses (e.g., transportation, personal expenses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_fees_unitid FOREIGN KEY ("unitid") REFERENCES institutions ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_rates" (
  "graduation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduation rate entry */,
  "unitid" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* The graduation rate for the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the graduation rate data */,
  "graduation_rate_6yr" REAL /* Graduation rate within 6 years */,
  "transfer_out_rate" REAL /* Rate of students transferring out */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Rate of students dropping out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_rates_unitid FOREIGN KEY ("unitid") REFERENCES institutions ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score entry */,
  "unitid" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "act_25" INTEGER /* 25th percentile ACT score */,
  "act_75" INTEGER /* 75th percentile ACT score */,
  "act_mid" INTEGER /* Midpoint ACT score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the test score data */,
  "sat_25" INTEGER /* 25th percentile SAT score */,
  "sat_75" INTEGER /* 75th percentile SAT score */,
  "sat_mid" INTEGER /* Midpoint SAT score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_unitid FOREIGN KEY ("unitid") REFERENCES institutions ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid entry */,
  "unitid" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "total_aid" REAL /* Total financial aid distributed */,
  "avg_aid" REAL /* Average financial aid per student */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial aid data */,
  "pell_grant_recipients" INTEGER /* Number of students receiving Pell Grants */,
  "loans_issued" INTEGER /* Number of loans issued */,
  "average_loan_amount" REAL /* Average amount of loans per student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_unitid FOREIGN KEY ("unitid") REFERENCES institutions ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the platform (e.g., admin, researcher, faculty) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "unitid" INTEGER /* ID of the institution being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_unitid FOREIGN KEY ("unitid") REFERENCES institutions ("unitid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report content */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
